name: vibe-fs
description: vibe-me reimagined in F# compiled to JavaScript via Fable

scripts.build: dotnet fable vibe-fs.fsproj --outDir build && rm -f build/fable_modules/.gitignore && cp build-package.json build/package.json
scripts.test:kernel: pnpm run build:tests && node tests/runner.js ReviewTests AgentTests KernelTests FuzzyTests DynTests DelegateTests ResolveAiSettingsTests MagicTests KnowledgeGraphKernelTests TitleFetchGuardTests
scripts.test:shell: pnpm run build:tests && node tests/runner.js ShellTests KnowledgeGraphFileTests
scripts.test:integration: pnpm run build:tests && node tests/runner.js IntegrationKnowledgeGraphPreludeSpecs IntegrationAfterHookSpecs IntegrationMaintenanceSpecs IntegrationSubmitKnowledgeGraphSpecs IntegrationBookkeeperSpecs IntegrationToolDefSpecs IntegrationSubagentSpecs IntegrationMiscSpecs IntegrationPluginTests IntegrationEventTests IntegrationDedupTests IntegrationToolTests IntegrationChatTests KnowledgeGraphTests
